Name: Newspaper
Text: The government’s newly developed AI, ‘Eve’ and ‘Adam,’ have long surpassed the famous detective agency, ‘Noah’s Ark.’

Name: Newspaper
Text: Use AI to solve problems! No need to study or work in a utopia!

Name: Noah
Text: It’s true that fewer people have come to ‘Noah’s Ark’ since AI was developed.

Name: Noah
Text: At first, people were worried that AI might cause them to stop thinking altogether...

Name: Noah
Text: But now, even that worry has disappeared over time.

Name: Noah
Text: AI is a useful tool. It’s not bad as long as we use it properly.
